auth.subtitle: Shared household expenses
auth.name: Name
auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

onboarding.subtitle: Create a household or join one with an invite code.

home.inviteHint: Share it so others can join the household.
home.salaryHint: Each member's contribution percentage is derived from salaries.
home.navCategoriesDesc: Expense categories with color and icon
home.nextHint: 🚧 Next: receipt OCR and expense prediction (see ROADMAP.md).

budget.title: Budget
budget.subtitle: Monthly household planning.
budget.budgetsSubtitle: Create one or more budgets (mortgage, groceries…), each with its amount and split.
budget.budgetsEmpty: No budgets yet. Meanwhile the salary sum is used.
budget.splitHint: Proportional: each member pays by salary. Equal: the same for everyone.
budget.adjustHintMonth: Set a total for this month only (a one-off exception over your budgets).
budget.contributionsEmpty: Define budgets or salaries to split the contribution.
budget.byCategoryEmpty: No confirmed expenses yet this month.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Household expense categories, with color and icon.
categories.name: Category name
categories.empty: No categories yet. Create the first one (energy, groceries, loans…).

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.noCategoriesWarn: You have no categories yet. Create some to classify your expenses.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Warnings when monthly spending exceeds a threshold.
alerts.name: Alert name
alerts.hintPercent: Fires when reaching that % of the chosen scope's limit (household budget, a budget, or the category's limit).
alerts.hintAmount: Fires when monthly spending reaches that amount.
alerts.empty: No alerts yet. Create one to watch household or category spending.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.codeNotFound: No household exists with that code.
errors.noActiveHousehold: You don't have an active household.
errors.categoryDuplicate: A category with that name already exists.
errors.amountPositive: The amount must be greater than 0
errors.payerNotMember: The payer isn't a member of the household.
errors.thresholdPositive: The threshold must be greater than 0
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 6 characters.
